items.abstract: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit has vacated the district court order that required the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to regulate the “unreasonable risk” the court found to be posed by the fluoridation of drinking water. The Ninth Circuit issued a deci

items.title: EPA to Issue Two New PFAS Rules Impacting Drinking Water

items.title: From Liability to Legacy: Leveraging CERCLA to Protect Public Water Systems
